name: VSE CORP
summary: VSE Corporation is a leading provider of aftermarket parts distribution and maintenance, repair and overhaul (MRO) services for air transportation assets, serving commercial airlines, regional airlines, air cargo transporters, MRO integrators, aviation manufacturers, corporate aircraft owners, and fixed-base operators. Operating as a single Aviation segment, VSE supplies parts through global distribution centers and provides MRO services from strategically positioned repair facilities. The company previously operated Fleet and Federal and Defense segments, both of which have been divested.

products.name: Aftermarket Parts Distribution
products.description: Supply and distribution of aftermarket aircraft parts through global distribution centers of excellence.

products.name: MRO Services
products.description: Maintenance, repair and overhaul services for components and engine accessories supporting commercial, business and general aviation.

products.name: Supply Chain Management
products.description: Mission-critical supply chain management services for aviation operators and fleet customers.
